rationale: Build on the current best soft quant-aware projection ramp rather than resetting direction. The change is confined to the final/int8 path: each 2D tensor now compares zero-offset, row-mean, and row-midpoint centering and uses the lowest clipped dynamic-range option, while still skipping offsets when they do not beat plain per-row int8 overall. This compounds a near-best idea category, directly targets final_int8_zlib_roundtrip_exact val_bpb, and removes the old unused offset-ratio heuristic.
title: Per-Row Zero-Mean-Midpoint Offset Choice
